home.title: Quote Viewer — Start your day with quotes and scriptures
home.description: Get daily inspiration from great thinkers and scriptures. Bookmark, collect, and share — enrich your day with Quote Viewer.

quotes.title: Quote Collection
quotes.subtitle: Find and save quotes that resonate with you
quotes.noFavoritesDesc: Tap the heart to save quotes you love.

auth.welcomeDesc: Log in to sync your collection across devices
auth.guestBannerText: Log in to sync your collection across all devices

profile.title: My Profile
profile.loginRequiredDesc: Please log in to view your profile.

submit.title: Submit a Quote
submit.subtitle: Share your favorite quote with the community
submit.successDesc: Your quote will be reviewed and added. Thank you!
submit.loginRequired: You need to log in to submit a quote.
submit.errorRequired: Please enter the quote and author.
submit.errorMinLength: Quote must be at least 10 characters.

recommendations.title: Recommended for You
recommendations.subtitle: Personalized recommendations based on your favorites
recommendations.empty: Add more favorites to get personalized recommendations.

footer.pushDenied: Please allow notifications in browser settings.

scriptures.title: Scriptures
scriptures.subtitle: Start your day with scripture
scriptures.loginPrompt: Log in to see all scriptures
scriptures.emptyCollectionDesc: Use the draw button above to collect your first scripture
scriptures.drawerDesc: Press the button to get a random scripture
scriptures.drawerCooldown: You can draw once every 3 hours
scriptures.cooldownMessage: Come back in 3 hours to draw again

streak.day3: 3-day streak! A good habit has begun.
streak.day14: 2-week streak! Quotes are now part of your routine.

landing.heroDesc: Start every day with wisdom from great thinkers and scripture. Bookmark, collect, and share inspiration.
landing.ctaDesc: Log in to save your scripture collection across all devices. Start your collection today.
landing.featuresSectionDesc: Not just a quote app. A fresh experience combining inspiration and gamification.
landing.feature1Desc: Get a new quote automatically every day based on the date. 53 handpicked quotes from great thinkers.
landing.feature2Desc: Draw a scripture every 3 hours to collect. Common, Rare, and Legendary rarities add fun to collecting.
landing.feature3Desc: Bookmark your favorite quotes and complete your collection by gathering all 31 scriptures.
landing.step1Desc: Open Quote Viewer at the start of your day. Today's quote is waiting fresh for you.
landing.step2Desc: Bookmark quotes you love or copy them to your clipboard to share with friends.
landing.step3Desc: Draw a scripture every 3 hours and collect all 31 to complete your collection.

pwa.installDesc: Add to home screen for quick access
